name: C & C Coins and Pawn Inc.
description_short: C & C Coins and Pawn Inc. is a pawn shop located in Westland, MI offering collateral-based loans and trading services for coins, jewelry, and other valuables.
description_long: C & C Coins and Pawn Inc. operates as a traditional pawn shop serving the Westland, Michigan area. Pawn shops provide an alternative financial service for consumers who need quick access to cash by using personal valuables as collateral. C & C Coins and Pawn Inc. appears to specialize in coins and jewelry-based transactions, as suggested by their business name. The company maintains consistent business hours, operating Monday through Saturday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, indicating a commitment to accessibility for their customer base. Their focus on coins specifically suggests they may cater to both casual pawners and collectors. As a collateral-based lending service, C & C Coins and Pawn Inc. serves consumers who need immediate liquidity without credit checks or traditional lending requirements. The business model allows customers to either sell items outright or use them as collateral for short-term loans, with the ability to reclaim items if the loan is repaid. This service model has been a staple of consumer finance for decades and provides an alternative to payday loans or credit-based borrowing. The main limitation is the reliance on having valuable items to pledge, and pawn transactions typically offer significantly less than retail value for items. Customers should understand that if they cannot repay a pawn loan, the business retains ownership of the pledged items, making this a higher-stakes form of borrowing compared to traditional personal loans.
pros: Consistent operating hours Monday-Saturday from 10:00 AM-6:00 PM for accessibility
No credit check required for collateral-based loans
Quick cash access without lengthy application processes typical of banks
Located in Westland, MI with a physical storefront for in-person transactions
Specializes in coins and jewelry, suggesting expertise in valuing precious metals and collectibles
Direct phone line (313) 551-1746 available for customer inquiries
cons: Limited information available about loan terms, interest rates, or repayment periods from website
Pawn loans typically offer significantly less than retail value for items (standard industry practice)
No online presence or digital loan application capability evident from provided materials
Risk of losing personal items if unable to repay the loan within the agreed timeframe
Website content does not disclose specific APR rates or fee structures
best_for: Individuals who own valuable coins or jewelry and need immediate cash without credit verification
Collectors or precious metals enthusiasts seeking to liquidate or temporarily pawn valuable items
Consumers who prefer face-to-face transactions and immediate loan decisions
diagnosis: C & C Coins and Pawn Inc. is best for customers who own valuable coins, jewelry, or collectibles and need immediate cash without credit checks or bank applications. The main caveat is that pawn loans result in significantly discounted valuations compared to retail prices, and borrowers risk losing their items permanently if unable to repay within the loan term.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal valuables
